description: You only have one chance to make a good first impression, so if you want to look smart, the lino perros Handbag Collection provides you with a superb array of ideas. The bags are all spacious, with multiple compartments and pockets allowing you to carry a lot more, and still be well organised. The collection is characterised by exciting design elements that break the monotony & make the bags more fun!Height: 14 cmWidth: 12 cmDepth: 6 cmMade of blended fabric for durabilityHas one main compartment with woven cords on the mouth to pull and close,  has one inner zipper and organiser sleeve for a mobile and essentialsTwo adjustable straps at the back for carrying ease and styleBrand name appliqué d on the front Zipper pocket at the back, on the front and on the sides for additional space      CareWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
